forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,55 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+depends_on:
+- 01KPG5YB7GTQ6Q3CEQAMXPJ58F
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: e280
+title: 'Commands: paste handler — column onto board'
+---
+## What
+
+Implement `ColumnIntoBoardHandler` — duplicates a column into a target board. Handler at `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/paste_handlers/column_into_board.rs`, matches `("column", "board")`.
+
+### Action
+
+1. Parse board id from target moniker.
+2. Clone `clipboard.fields` (column's `name`, `order`, any styling).
+3. Drop the source `order` — new column is appended at the end (highest order + 1) unless a later product decision changes this.
+4. Invoke `AddEntity::new("column").with_overrides(fields)`.
+5. Do NOT copy the column's tasks — this handler duplicates the column structure only. Task duplication is a separate concern.
+6. If `clipboard.is_cut`, delete the source column via `DeleteColumn::new(&clipboard.entity_id)`.
+
+### Files
+
+- CREATE `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/paste_handlers/column_into_board.rs`.
+- MODIFY `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/paste_handlers/mod.rs` — register call.
+
+### Subtasks
+
+- [ ] Implement `ColumnIntoBoardHandler`.
+- [ ] Register.
+- [ ] Colocate tests.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- [ ] Handler matches `("column", "board")`.
+- [ ] Pasting a column onto a board creates a new column with the source's name/fields appended to the board.
+- [ ] Tasks in the source column are NOT duplicated.
+- [ ] Cut variant deletes the source column after create.
+
+## Tests
+
+- [ ] `paste_column_into_board_creates_column` — source "Doing" column; paste onto board; new "Doing" column exists.
+- [ ] `paste_column_into_board_does_not_copy_tasks` — source column has 3 tasks; new column has 0.
+- [ ] `paste_column_appended_at_end` — new column's order is greater than all existing columns'.
+- [ ] `paste_cut_column_deletes_source`.
+- [ ] Run command: `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban paste_handlers::column_into_board` — all green.
+
+## Workflow
+
+- Use `/tdd`.
+
+#commands
+
+Depends on: 01KPG5YB7GTQ6Q3CEQAMXPJ58F (mechanism)
\ No newline at end of file

changes.value: Commands: paste handler — column onto board

## What

Implement `ColumnIntoBoardHandler` — duplicates a column into a target board. Handler at `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/paste_handlers/column_into_board.rs`, matches `("column", "board")`.

### Action

1. Parse board id from target moniker.
2. Clone `clipboard.fields` (column's `name`, `order`, any styling).
3. Drop the source `order` — new column is appended at the end (highest order + 1) unless a later product decision changes this.
4. Invoke `AddEntity::new("column").with_overrides(fields)`.
5. Do NOT copy the column's tasks — this handler duplicates the column structure only. Task duplication is a separate concern.
6. If `clipboard.is_cut`, delete the source column via `DeleteColumn::new(&clipboard.entity_id)`.

### Files

- CREATE `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/paste_handlers/column_into_board.rs`.
- MODIFY `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/paste_handlers/mod.rs` — register call.

### Subtasks

- [ ] Implement `ColumnIntoBoardHandler`.
- [ ] Register.
- [ ] Colocate tests.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Handler matches `("column", "board")`.
- [ ] Pasting a column onto a board creates a new column with the source's name/fields appended to the board.
- [ ] Tasks in the source column are NOT duplicated.
- [ ] Cut variant deletes the source column after create.

## Tests

- [ ] `paste_column_into_board_creates_column` — source "Doing" column; paste onto board; new "Doing" column exists.
- [ ] `paste_column_into_board_does_not_copy_tasks` — source column has 3 tasks; new column has 0.
- [ ] `paste_column_appended_at_end` — new column's order is greater than all existing columns'.
- [ ] `paste_cut_column_deletes_source`.
- [ ] Run command: `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban paste_handlers::column_into_board` — all green.

## Workflow

- Use `/tdd`.

#commands

Depends on: 01KPG5YB7GTQ6Q3CEQAMXPJ58F (mechanism)

\ No newline at end of file
+Depends on: 01KPG5YB7GTQ6Q3CEQAMXPJ58F (mechanism)
+
+## Implementation Notes
+
+- Created `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/paste_handlers/column_into_board.rs` with `ColumnIntoBoardHandler` struct and `PasteHandler` impl.
+- Per parallel-safety override: only added `pub mod column_into_board;` to `paste_handlers/mod.rs`. Did NOT add `m.register(ColumnIntoBoardHandler);` to `register_paste_handlers()` — orchestrator will batch-register.
+- `next_order()` mirrors the unsupplied-order branch of `AddColumn` (highest existing order + 1, or 0 when empty) so the paste-created column lands in the same slot a fresh `column.add` would take.
+- `FIELDS_TO_DROP = ["order", "id", "entity_type"]` — order dropped to enforce append-at-end; id/entity_type dropped because the new column receives a fresh ULID and fixed type.
+- Cut path deletes the source column AFTER successful create (mirrors sibling `*_into_*` handlers); propagates `DeleteColumn` errors (e.g. `ColumnNotEmpty`) rather than swallowing.
+- Tests use a local `PasteMatrix` to avoid coupling to `register_paste_handlers()` (per override). Used `make_ctx` / `setup` / `snapshot_column` helpers matching the patterns in `task_into_column.rs` and `task_into_board.rs`.
+- All 46 paste_handlers tests pass; clippy clean.
\ No newline at end of file
